title: Viners Barware 2-Piece Bottle Stopper Gift Set
features: CLASSIC BARWARE | Our stylish and modern clamp bottle stoppers can be used to keep your wine bottle airtight. Each is elegantly and expertly crafted, making them the perfect gift for wine lovers on any occasion

MULTI-PURPOSE STOPPERS | These bottle stoppers are versatile and reusable. Pulling the clamp lever causes the plastic sealing rings to create an airtight seal on various bottle neck sizes. Each clamp arm has a built-in crown cap bottle opener
MADE TO LAST | These adjustable bungs are made to last, from quality materials, and have built-in durability that ensures they will last for years to come. Hand wash only

BARWARE RANGE | Entertain, create and serve with flair and quality thanks to the Viners Barware Collection. Our range has all the tools to professionally entertain guests at home, from bottle storage to cocktail shakers, stirrers, and wine buckets

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust barware made from fine quality materials
description: From the manufacturer Single Wall Wine Cooler Long Steel Drinking Straws Gift Box Ice Tong Bottle Stopper Champagne Bottle Stopper Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.7 out of 5 stars 9 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 4.0 out of 5 stars 29 1.0 out of 5 stars 1 4.0 out of 5 stars 1 Price £8.75 £ 8 . 75 £3.15 £ 3 . 15 £2.25 £ 2 . 25 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 £4.20 £ 4 . 20 Description This versatile ice bucket is great for holding ice or storing freshly prepared fruits. Finished in high quality stainless steel, this bucket will add style and elegance to your barware collection. Reduce plastic waste by using these reusable and durable long stainless steel straws. Supplied with a cleaning brush, the straws are easy to clean and can be used time and time again. You can use our stylish and modern ice tongs to serve ice and keep drinks cold. It is elegant and expertly crafted, making it the ideal gift to give to those who love to entertain. The triangular shaped stainless steel bottle stopper with rubber sealing rings will create an air tight seal on a variety of different bottle shapes, keeping the contents fresher for longer. The champagne stopper has a push down and wing type mechanism which creates an airtight seal. Designed to maintain the fizz and bubbles in unfinished sparkling wines and champagne.
